cli: test -f .devbox/.pw-installed || (playwright install chromium && touch .devbox/.pw-installed); python sbat.py
gui: test -f .devbox/.pw-installed || (playwright install chromium && touch .devbox/.pw-installed); python sbat_gui_pyside.py
gui-gtk: test -f .devbox/.pw-installed || (playwright install chromium && touch .devbox/.pw-installed); python sbat_gui_gtk.py
setup: pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium
